datasync.task.s3.CfnAbout: Specifies the Amazon S3 bucket where DataSync uploads your [task report](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/datasync/latest/userguide/creating-task-reports.html).

datasync.task.s3.BucketAccessRoleArn.Description: Specifies the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM policy that allows DataSync to upload a task report to your S3 bucket. For more information, see [Allowing DataSync to upload a task report to an Amazon S3 bucket](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/datasync/latest/userguide/creating-task-reports.html).

datasync.task.s3.S3BucketArn.Description: Specifies the ARN of the S3 bucket where DataSync uploads your report.

datasync.task.s3.Subdirectory.Description: Specifies a bucket prefix for your report.
